snippets.snippet: The owner extremely helpful!! So polite.

advanceGuaranteeProgram.description: Agoda Preferred recommends trusted and verified properties that have a long-standing relationship with Agoda and meet certain criteria.

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Excellent room comfort & quality
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests have rated this property 9.0/10 on room comfort and quality

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

adult: Guests 6 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Take a look at these facilities:
Things to do, ways to relax

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The owner extremely helpful!! So polite. Even helped me get a motorcycle. Superb stay.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Netter Empfang durch landlady, sehr hilfsbereit. 
Wasserspender heiß und kalt, Aircon. 
Ruhig gelegen aber trotzdem zentral.
Preis Leistungs Verhältnis sehr gut 👍

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Took the room with fan. Room too hot. Need air-conditioning. Good location if you have your own transport (scooter, car). Not far from the beach. Nothing much to do around hotel. Room is clean (but too hot in the room). Got parking space for scooter. Not sure I would come again to this hotel.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Strategic and comfortable location, with many cafes down the road so you won't have to worry about hunger, close to Sabang Fair. Recommended for those who want to stay here.
comments.reviewTitle: The location is good and comfortable.
comments.originalComment: lokasi startegis dan nyaman, jalan kedepan banyak cafe jadi jangan takut kelaparan, ke sabang fair dekat. rekomend buat yang mau nginap disini

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The location is very strategic, and comfortable on the upper terrace where you can see the beach from afar. Facilities need to be improved, such as providing towels and cleaning the terrace. Other than that, it's good and recommended for those wanting to stay in Sabang.
comments.reviewTitle: The location is good and comfortable.
comments.originalComment: lokasi sangat strategis, dan nyaman di teras atas bisa liat pantai dari jauh. fasilitas perlu di tambah seperti handuk, kebersihan teras. selebihnya bagus dan rekomendasi buat yang mau nginap disabang.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: dekat dengan segala akses, recommend

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: This location is suitable for those going to Sabang, in front of the accommodation there is a cafe, many vendors are selling so it's safe. The owner is friendly.
comments.originalComment: lokasi ini cocok buat yang ke sabang, depan penginapan ada cafe, banyak yang jualan jadi aman lah. yg punya ramah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The place is comfortable... the owner is friendly and kind.
comments.originalComment: Tempat nya nyaman... owner nya juga ramah dan baik

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: It was a bit like being home. The living area was fournished a 1960s era. The lady of the house was very kind and helped us with every day needs.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Kasurnya empuk, kamar mandi nya bersih dan pakai shower, ada ditunjuk arah kiblat, disediakan juga shajadah untuk shalat. BAGI yang GK bisa tidur dengan AC pun tersedia kamar kipas angin, Dan yang lebih penting Murah:)
